[It] Conformance Tests conformance-tests
[It] Workload cluster creation Creating a private cluster [OPTIONAL] Creates a public management cluster in a custom vnet
[It] Workload cluster creation Creating a highly available cluster [REQUIRED] With 3 control-plane nodes and 2 Linux and 2 Windows worker nodes

test_cases.failure_message:
Timed out after 1200.001s.
Timed out waiting for 3 control plane machines to exist
Expected
    <int>: 2
to equal
    <int>: 3
test_cases.failure_body:
[FAILED] Timed out after 1200.001s.
Timed out waiting for 3 control plane machines to exist
Expected
    <int>: 2
to equal
    <int>: 3
In [It] at: /home/prow/go/pkg/mod/sigs.k8s.io/cluster-api/test@v1.13.2/framework/controlplane_helpers.go:115 @ 06/03/26 15:36:07.1

ai_summary.summary: Test failed due to timeout waiting for 3 control plane machines to exist, but only 2 were found. No concrete error evidence found in available artifacts.

ai_analysis.root_cause: The test timed out waiting for 3 control plane machines to exist, but only 2 were found. However, no concrete error evidence was found in the available artifacts. The cloud-init-output.log for one machine showed no errors, and the Azure activity logs were not accessible (404 error). The AzureMachine directory was empty, indicating possible issues with resource creation or artifact capture.
ai_analysis.suggested_fix: No remediation possible from available evidence: artifacts show missing AzureMachine resources and inaccessible logs; would need to re-run test with better logging or check Azure quotas and provisioning configurations.
